annotations.label: Two-sample location test

annotations.label: Welch's t-test statistic

anchor.section: Equal or unequal sample sizes, unequal variances ( s X 1 > 2 s X 2 or s X 2 > 2 s X 1 )
anchor.snippet: also known as Welch's t -test, is used only when the two population variances are not assumed to be equal

annotations.note: Welch's t-test is not formalized in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Welch–Satterthwaite equation

anchor.snippet: This is known as the Welch–Satterthwaite equation

annotations.label: Power of a test

anchor.snippet: The power of a test is the probability that the test rejects the null hypothesis
